package rulecoverage

func PositiveParsemultipartformLargeDefaultMemory() string {
    ruleID := "parsemultipartform_large_default_memory"
    family := "gin"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Gin handlers that call ParseMultipartForm(...) with large in-memory thresholds on request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
